title: Elves Behavin' Badly 12 Inch Long Leg Soft Body Vinyl Face Elf with Hat OR Make Your Own 12 Inch Elf (12 INCH ELF)
features: This adorable elf plush sits and watches over your home at Christmas time
He reports back to Santa to tell him whether you've been Naughty or nice!
Suitable as gift or a decoration
He has a soft plush body and a vinyl head
